hop_limit_violation.explanation: Mission simulated as having already reached hop_count=8 (TRANSPORT_CONFIG.json max_hops) through 8 prior synthetic handoffs. A 9th handoff was attempted (Claude -> ChatGPT), which would increment hop_count to 9, exceeding max_hops. Per GOVERNANCE.md §4, the handoff was refused and the Mission was routed to dead-letter/ with hop_count frozen at the last valid value (8), not incremented to the violating value.

request.title: ADR-030 Hop Limit test — simulated loop
request.description: Synthetic test: Mission constructed already at hop_count = max_hops to exercise the LOOP_SUSPECTED dead-letter path without needing 8 real cross-participant handoffs. Confirms the refusal-to-increment-past-ceiling logic (ADR-030 §3.2) is followable in practice.
request.expected_output: Mission lands in dead-letter/ with reason LOOP_SUSPECTED, hop_count not incremented past max_hops.

history.detail: Constructed pre-set to hop_count=8 (=max_hops) for test purposes, not via 8 real handoffs
Simulated handoff to ChatGPT would set hop_count=9 > max_hops=8
